charts.title: Layoff Timeline
charts.desc: Employees affected by effective date, sized and coloured by county.

charts.title: Monthly Totals
charts.desc: Total employees laid off per month with 3-month moving average.

charts.desc: Daily layoffs, 30-day rolling average, and cumulative total.

charts.title: Top Companies

charts.title: County Heatmap
charts.desc: Layoffs by county and month — heat intensity = employees.

charts.title: Year-over-Year
charts.desc: Annual employees affected and notice count from 2014 to present.

charts.title: Multi-Year Trend
charts.desc: Monthly layoff pattern overlaid across all years for seasonal comparison.

charts.title: Notice Lead Time
charts.desc: Distribution of days from notice filing to effective date vs 60-day WARN requirement.

charts.title: Top Counties
charts.desc: Top 10 counties by total employees affected.
